title: Ai Lop Yu Pul
overview: One morning, Emak’s kiosk was blown with fireworks by Beno. Topan was very angry and wanted to revenge to Beno and his friend, Satyo. When Topan entered Satyo’s house, he instead hit Indah, Satyo’s daughter who was going to run away from home. Indah wanted Topan to use her as hostage and they both ran away from Beno and Satyo. A series of hilarious incidents folllows….
